title: UFO Insider Drops BOMBSHELL; Area 51 Chatter Explodes Over ‘4 Alien Species’
description: Fresh UFO disclosure claims are exploding online after Dr. Hal Puthoff — a CIA-funded researcher and former advisor to the Pentagon-linked AAWSAP program — claimed the United States allegedly recovered remains tied to “four separate types” of extraterrestrial life. Speaking during a UFO roundtable on Steve Bartlett’s The Diary of a CEO podcast alongside The Age of Disclosure director Dan Farah, Puthoff said, “People who have been involved in recoveries have said there are at least four types. Four separate types.” He added, “Now I have not had direct access to that but I believe the people who I talked to,four separate types of life.” The resurfaced alien recovery claims are now fueling another massive online firestorm as fresh Pentagon UFO document releases continue driving debate around UAP disclosure.

title: New biblical fears as declassified UFO files reveal 'angels' in flight
description: New videos declassified by the Pentagon have revealed more sightings of alleged beings some are comparing to angels and biblical entities.

title: Pentagon UFO files REVEAL mysterious UAP formations over Iran, CENTCOM captures | WATCH
description: The Pentagon’s second wave of declassified UFO files has dropped, revealing unexplained UAP activity over Iran, Syria, Afghanistan, and the Persian Gulf. Infrared military footage, mission reports, and intelligence testimony point to multiple sightings across the CENTCOM region. This video breaks down the most shocking revelations.

title: The Livingston “dogman” and Scotland’s most baffling UFO mystery
description: When it comes to UFOs and other mysterious encounters, Ron Halliday has an encyclopaedic knowledge that spans almost every corner of Scotland.

title: Rare ‘UFO’ clouds stop people in their tracks as lenticulars appear over North East
description: Bank holiday sky watchers captured rare lenticular clouds, whose stacked, saucer-like shapes and stillness often prompt 'UFO sightings'.
